DISCOVERY 302, PETITIONER SAN FRANCISCO DEPUTY SHERIFFS' ASSOCIATION'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE (1) AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 11, 2019 AT 9:00 A.M. IN DEPARTMENT 301 DUE TO JPT PETER CATALANOTTI'S CONFLICT. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER CATALANOTTI, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED.

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, FEB-26-2019 HEARING HELD ON PETITIONER SAN FRANCISCO DEPUTY SHERIFFS' ASSOCIATION'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE (1) AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING. THE COURT ADOPTS IN FULL THE REPORT AND RECOMMENDATION OF THE JUDGE PRO TEM. RESPONDENT'S COUNSEL IS ORDERED TO GIVE A COPY OF THE JUDGE PRO TEM'S REPORT TO PETITIONER'S COUNSEL. (AS FULLY REPORTED IN THE REPORTER'S TRANSCRIPT). COUNSEL FOR THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. (302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One (1) And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-26-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rafal Ofierski, Deputy City Attorney 415-554-3800, Office of the City Attorney for Respondent City and County of San Francisco
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Respondent reports he did not receive a copy of the Judge Pro Tem's report and recommendation. The Court gives 2 copies of the Judge Pro Tem's report to Counsel. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER SAN FRANCISCO DEPUTY SHERIFFS' ASSOCIATION'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One (1) And Request For Sanctions.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. The Court adopts in full the report and recommendation of the Judge Pro Tem. Respondent's Counsel is ordered to give a copy of the Judge Pro Tem's report to Petitioner's Counsel. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Counsel for the City and County of San Francisco is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

Tashayla D. Billington, esq. (916-318-4605) of Mastagni Holstedt for Plaintiff.
